response:
TEMPERATURE RISES AS SUMMER SUN SHINES SOFTLY ON STREETS.
SEASONS SHIFT WITH SLOW STEPS AND SILENT WINDS.
SANDY SHORES SEE SWELLING WAVES SLASHING SHORES.
SUNSETS SPILL STARS INTO SKY SPACES.
STORMS SWEEP SOFTLY THROUGH SILENT FORESTS.
SWEET SCENTS OF SUMMER STIR THE SOUL.
SILVER SNOWS SOON WILL SINK INTO SOIL.
SUNLIGHT SPOILS THE SHADOWS OF SPRING.
STARS SHINE SO BRIGHTLY IN SKY SPACES.
SUNSETS SLOWLY SINK BELOW THE SEA.
SUMMER STORIES START WITH SILENT SUNSHINE.
ROLL THE DICE AND SEE WHAT SUMMER BRINGS.
SUNSHINE STAYS STRONG THROUGHOUT THE SEASONS.
